title: Find LCM of Two Numbers
description:
Given two integers `a` and `b`, find their Least Common Multiple (LCM).

The LCM is the smallest positive integer that is divisible by both numbers.
hints: Use the formula: LCM(a, b) = (a × b) / GCD(a, b)
First implement or use the GCD function.
Handle the case where one or both numbers are 0.
